name: FLOW_07_COMPARISON_ALTERNATIVES
description: Compares villa investment to alternative investments

comparisons.panglao_advantage:
✅ Panglao:
• Lower acquisition: PHP 32.5M vs local 100M+
• Higher returns: 20-25% vs 5-8% home ROI
• Easier scaling: Proven model
• Tax benefits: No annual property tax
• Appreciation: 3-5% annually
• Geographic diversification

✅ Panglao:
• Tangible asset (not digital)
• Stable income: Monthly, not volatile
• Less affected by markets
• 17-25% vs 8-12% stock average
• You own real thing, not fund share
• Inflation hedge: Real estate appreciates

✅ Panglao:
• Regulated: Not speculative
• Guaranteed income: Not asset appreciation only
• Insurable: Property covered
• Legal clarity: Clear ownership
• Sleep-at-night certainty
• 25% guaranteed vs 200% maybe

✅ Panglao:
• Income-generating (vs residential expense)
• Higher ROI: 20% vs 3-5% appreciation
• Managed for you (vs tenant headaches)
• Better price point: Same capital = more units
• Tourism growth market (vs saturated residential)
• Competitive advantage: Proven manager

✅ Panglao:
• DIRECT ownership: You own the property
• No management fees (beyond operational)
• CONTROL: You decide → We execute
• Higher transparency: Monthly statements
• Exit strategy: Sell property directly
• Better ROI: No fund middleman margin

✅ Panglao:
• Better returns: 17-25% vs 3-5% bonds
• Monthly vs annual/maturity payments
• Inflation protection: Real estate hedges
• Tangible security: Property backing
• Appreciation potential: Bonds don't grow
• More exciting: Real business, not paper

closing_statement:
💡 Bottom line:

Want your money to:
